Apache Juneau
  • Overview
  • Package
  • Class
  • Use
  • Tree
  • Deprecated
  • Index
  • Help

Uses of Package
org.apache.juneau.rest.server

Packages that use org.apache.juneau.rest.server
Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.microservice.jetty.resources
Predefined Jetty Microservice Resources
org.apache.juneau.microservice.management
Actuator-style management-surface endpoints (microservice-module flavors).
org.apache.juneau.microservice.resources
Predefined Microservice Resources
org.apache.juneau.petstore.jetty
Apache Juneau Petstore - Jetty/Microservice deployment.
org.apache.juneau.petstore.rest
Petstore REST resources.
org.apache.juneau.petstore.springboot
Apache Juneau Petstore - Spring Boot deployment.
org.apache.juneau.rest.mock.classic
Mocked REST client and supporting classes for in-JVM testing built on the classic Apache HttpClient API.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server
REST Server API
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.arg
REST Method Argument Beans
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth
Authentication (AuthN) guards, servlet-layer filters, SPIs, and request-time helpers for juneau-rest-server.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.beans
REST Interface Helper Classes
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.config
Predefined REST configuration interfaces
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.convention
Convention-endpoints mixin pack — composable @Rest(mixins=...) resources that ship the "internet conventions" surface (favicon, robots, sitemap, version, well-known) every public-facing service eventually grows.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.converter
REST Response Converters
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.debug
REST Debug APIs
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.docs
API-docs mixin pack — composable @Rest(mixins=...) resources that publish Swagger v2 and OpenAPI 3.1 spec endpoints with Swagger-UI and Redoc HTML mounts.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.guard
REST Guards
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.health
Built-in health, readiness, and liveness probe support for Juneau REST servers.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.httppart
REST HTTP Parts
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.management
Actuator-style management-surface endpoints (server-module flavors).
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.mcp
Stateless Model Context Protocol (MCP) endpoint built on juneau-rest-server using the juneau-bean-mcp wire types.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.metrics.micrometer
Micrometer bridge for the juneau-rest-server MetricsRecorder SPI.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.openapi
Server-side OpenAPI 3.1 emission — the OpenApiProvider SPI and the BasicOpenApiProvider default implementation that walks an RestContext and produces an OpenApi document.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.ops
Ops / introspection mixin pack — composable @Rest(mixins=...) resources that ship the operational surface (request echo, JVM admin, route index) every long-running Juneau service eventually grows.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.processor
HTTP Response Processors
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.rdf.config
Predefined REST resource configuration interfaces that add RDF (Jena) marshalling support.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.reactive
Reactive-Streams return-type support for @RestOp handlers (opt-in, dependency-free).
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.remote
Remote service API
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.rrpc
REST Remote Procedure Call API
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.servlet
REST Servlets
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.springboot
Spring Boot Integration
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.sse
Server-Sent Events (SSE) support for Juneau REST servers.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.staticfile
REST Static Files Support
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.swagger
REST Swagger Support
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.tracing
Tracing SPI for juneau-rest-server — per-request span hook backed by a caller-supplied TracerHook bean.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.tracing.otel
OpenTelemetry bridge for the juneau-rest-server TracerHook SPI.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.view
Engine-agnostic server-side-rendered view extension point.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.view.freemarker
Apache FreeMarker view-rendering bridge — opt-in juneau-rest-server-view-freemarker module.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.view.jsp
JSP view-rendering bridge — opt-in juneau-rest-server-view-jsp module.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.view.mustache
Mustache view-rendering bridge — opt-in juneau-rest-server-view-mustache module.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.view.thymeleaf
Thymeleaf view-rendering bridge — opt-in juneau-rest-server-view-thymeleaf module.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.widget
HTML Widget API
org.apache.juneau.server.config.rest
Server Configuration REST
  • Classes in org.apache.juneau.rest.server used by org.apache.juneau.microservice.jetty.resources
    Class
    Description
    Rest
    Used to denote that a class is a REST resource and to associate metadata on it.
    RestGet
    Identifies a REST GET operation Java method on a RestServlet implementation class.
    RestPost
    Identifies a REST POST operation Java method on a RestServlet implementation class.
    RestRequest
    Represents an HTTP request for a REST resource.
    RestResponse
    Represents an HTTP response for a REST resource.
  • Classes in org.apache.juneau.rest.server used by org.apache.juneau.microservice.management
    Class
    Description
    Rest
    Used to denote that a class is a REST resource and to associate metadata on it.
    RestContext
    Defines the initial configuration of a RestServlet or @Rest annotated object.
    RestGet
    Identifies a REST GET operation Java method on a RestServlet implementation class.
    RestRequest
    Represents an HTTP request for a REST resource.
  • Classes in org.apache.juneau.rest.server used by org.apache.juneau.microservice.resources
    Class
    Description
    Rest
    Used to denote that a class is a REST resource and to associate metadata on it.
    RestDelete
    Identifies a REST DELETE operation Java method on a RestServlet implementation class.
    RestGet
    Identifies a REST GET operation Java method on a RestServlet implementation class.
    RestInit
    Identifies a method that gets called during servlet initialization.
    RestOp
    Identifies a REST operation Java method on a RestServlet implementation class.
    RestPost
    Identifies a REST POST operation Java method on a RestServlet implementation class.
    RestPut
    Identifies a REST PUT operation Java method on a RestServlet implementation class.
    RestRequest
    Represents an HTTP request for a REST resource.
    RestResponse
    Represents an HTTP response for a REST resource.

    Used to denote that a class is a REST resource and to associate metadata on it.

    Description
    RestContext
    Defines the initial configuration of a RestServlet or @Rest annotated object.
  • Classes in org.apache.juneau.rest.server used by org.apache.juneau.rest.server
    Class
    Description
    AbstractRestBuilder
    Shared abstract base for the RestBuilderflavor builders (RestServlet.Builder, RestResource.Builder, RestMixin.Builder).
    Debug
    Debug configuration metadata for @Rest and @RestOp.
    DebugAnnotation.Builder
     
    Mixin
    Rich mixin definition for the @Rest(mixinDefs=...) attribute.
    MixinAnnotation.Builder
    Builder class.
    OpSwagger
    Extended annotation for RestOp.swagger().
    OpSwaggerAnnotation.Builder
    Builder class.
    Rest
    Used to denote that a class is a REST resource and to associate metadata on it.
    RestAnnotation.Builder
    Builder class.
    RestBuilder
    Public, fluent, self-typed configuration surface for programmatically configuring a @Rest resource, child resource, or mixin instead of (or in addition to) the @Rest annotation.
    RestChildMatch
    Represents a matched Rest-annotated child on an HTTP request.
    RestChildren
    Implements the child resources of a Rest-annotated class.
    RestChildren.Builder
    Builder class.
    RestContext
    Defines the initial configuration of a RestServlet or @Rest annotated object.
    RestContext.Args
    Bootstrap arguments for RestContext.
    RestContext.ContextKind
    The build-time kind of a RestContext — which of the three construction flavors produced it.
    RestContext.ResolvedMixin
    The discovery-time normalized declaration of a single mixin.
    RestDelete
    Identifies a REST DELETE operation Java method on a RestServlet implementation class.
    RestDeleteAnnotation.Builder
    Builder class.
    RestDestroy
    Identifies a method that gets called during servlet destroy.
    RestDestroyAnnotation.Builder
    Builder class.
    RestEndCall
    Identifies a method that gets called right before we exit the servlet service method.
    RestEndCallAnnotation.Builder
    Builder class.
    RestGet
    Identifies a REST GET operation Java method on a RestServlet implementation class.
    RestGetAnnotation.Builder
    Builder class.
    RestInit
    Identifies a method that gets called during servlet initialization.
    RestInitAnnotation.Builder
    Builder class.
    RestOp
    Identifies a REST operation Java method on a RestServlet implementation class.
    RestOpAnnotation.Builder
    Builder class.
    RestOpContext
    Represents a single Java servlet/resource method annotated with @RestOp.
    RestOperations
    Encapsulates the set of RestOp-annotated methods within a single Rest-annotated object.
    RestOperations.Builder
    Builder class.
    RestOpSession
    A session for a single HTTP request.
    RestOpSession.Builder
    Builder class.
    RestOptions
    Identifies a REST OPTIONS operation Java method on a RestServlet implementation class.
    RestOptionsAnnotation.Builder
    Builder class.
    RestPatch
    Identifies a REST PATH operation Java method on a RestServlet implementation class.
    RestPatchAnnotation.Builder
    Builder class.
    RestPost
    Identifies a REST POST operation Java method on a RestServlet implementation class.
    RestPostAnnotation.Builder
    Builder class.
    RestPostCall
    Identifies a method that gets called immediately after the @RestOp annotated method gets called.
    RestPostCallAnnotation.Builder
    Builder class.
    RestPostInit
    Identifies a method that gets called immediately after servlet initialization.
    RestPostInitAnnotation.Builder
    Builder class.
    RestPreCall
    Identifies a method that gets called immediately before the @RestOp annotated method gets called.
    RestPreCallAnnotation.Builder
    Builder class.
    RestPut
    Identifies a REST PUT operation Java method on a RestServlet implementation class.
    RestPutAnnotation.Builder
    Builder class.
    RestRequest
    Represents an HTTP request for a REST resource.
    RestRequest.DebugScope
    Request-scoped debug controls.
    RestResponse
    Represents an HTTP response for a REST resource.
    RestSession
    Represents a single HTTP request.
    RestSession.Builder
    Builder class.
    RestStartCall
    Identifies a method that is called immediately after the HttpServlet.service(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse) method is called.
    RestStartCallAnnotation.Builder
    Builder class.
    Swagger
    Extended annotation for @Rest(swagger).
    SwaggerAnnotation.Builder
    Builder class.
